purpose: Diffable before-state for the Doppler cleanup plan. Every later phase claim should diff against this file: script count, docs count, config/rule count, parity drift count, pending-test count, and core-check pass/fail. Do not edit this file by hand after the capture — write a new baseline artifact if a re-snapshot is needed.

partialNotes.phase-2-pending-test-isolation: Runner exclusion (*.pending.test.js) landed in tools/run-node-tests.js. Still needed: policy-entry/header requirement for pending tests, migration of doppler-public-logits-api-contract and demo-import-surface into the pending lane.
partialNotes.phase-3-exports-parity: Allowlist schema and expiry/unused enforcement landed in tools/check-exports-parity.js + tools/policies/exports-parity-allowlist.json. Still needed: promote into default green chain, classify the 40 drift files (runtime fix / declaration fix / stale removal / pending).

notes: exports:parity:check fail is expected pre-cleanup: allowlist is empty and 40 files/151 symbols of drift exist. This is the known tail to classify in phase 3.
pendingTestJs:0 reflects no aspirational tests migrated yet. Phase 2 migration will increment this without changing totalTestJs (rename only).
Script count:110 includes 8 ci:* aliases and 2 :strict suffixes as first-pass merge candidates. Full classification deferred to phase 1 (last phase).
developerGuides:20 counts README plus 19 guides; target end-state is 0 or 1 (index only).
topLevelMd:45 counts everything up to 2 directories deep in the repo root; rootMd:8 is files directly at the root. The 37-file delta is the sweep surface for phase 6.
